general-swe.name: General Software Engineer
general-swe.description: Software engineering roles with flexible tech requirements

jobs.title: Staff Engineer, QA Automation (Mobile & API Testing)
jobs.description:
REQUIREMENTS:

  • Total experience 7+ years.
  • Strong working experience in QA Automation with deep expertise in mobile (Android/iOS) and web automation testing.
  • Hands on experience in Java, Python, or JavaScript.
  • Expertise in writing SQL queries.
  • Solid understanding of CI/CD concepts and best practices, including build and source control automation tools like Jenkins, Git, and MS Azure DevOps.
  • Solid experience in API automation using Rest Assure
